required_skills: Design Systems Creation and Component Library Management
Typography, Color Theory, and Visual Hierarchy Principles
Responsive and Adaptive Layout Design for Web and Mobile
Icon Design, Illustration, and Visual Asset Production
Pixel-Perfect Design Handoff to Engineering Teams
Grid Systems and Spacing Frameworks for Consistent Layouts
Brand Identity Application and Visual Consistency Management
preferred_skills: Motion design and animation using tools such as After Effects or Lottie
Familiarity with front-end CSS frameworks such as Tailwind or Bootstrap
Dark mode and theme-switching design implementation
3D design elements and immersive visual design experience
Design token management using tools such as Tokens Studio
Experience designing for native iOS and Android using platform HIG guidelines
Print and marketing collateral design experience
responsibilities: Design pixel-perfect, high-fidelity UI screens and component states for web and mobile applications that align with brand guidelines and design system standards
Build, maintain, and evolve a scalable design system including reusable components, variants, tokens, and usage documentation in Figma
Create responsive layout structures and adaptive UI patterns that ensure visual consistency and usability across desktop, tablet, and mobile screen sizes
Define micro-interaction specifications, transition behaviors, and animation guidelines for engineers using tools such as Lottie or After Effects
Collaborate closely with UX designers to translate wireframes and user flows into visually compelling, on-brand UI designs ready for developer handoff
Prepare and deliver precise design handoff packages using Figma or Zeplin, including annotated specs, redlines, asset exports, and interaction notes
Conduct design QA reviews on implemented features, comparing live builds against design specifications and logging visual discrepancies for engineering resolution
Apply WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards to all UI designs, ensuring sufficient color contrast ratios, focus states, and scalable typography across all components
Work with brand and marketing teams to ensure product UI consistently reflects the company's visual identity, tone, and design language
Iterate on UI designs rapidly based on usability testing findings, stakeholder feedback, and A/B test results to continuously improve visual and functional quality
